title: Registry Configuration
description: Declares how a component registry extends the base spec.

designSystem.description: The design system this registry covers

agentMetaId.description: The HTML id of the embedded metadata block (e.g., 'uswds-agent-meta')

facets.description: List of facet field names to aggregate in facets.json

taxonomyVersion.description: Optional taxonomy version for the facet vocabulary

base.description: Base URL for raw file fetching (raw.githubusercontent.com/...)

additionalFields.description: Non-standard fields included in each tile's metadata

govCompliance.description: Government compliance standards this registry supports
